name: Anime List
tagline: Major anime and manga reference channel (Persian)
description: Anime List is a large anime/manga reference channel with about 27,000 subscribers (July 2026). Content is primarily Persian-language and covers anime broadly rather than adult-only material — include it if you want the anime half of this category.
seoDescription: Major anime and manga reference channel (Persian). Verified real and active July 2026 — subscribers, pros & cons and how to join.
